courseTitle: Advanced AI, Simulation, and Procedural Systems
title: Steering Behavior Game
genericDescription: Implement seek, flee, arrive, wander, flock, or path following; tune agent motion; expose behavior through play.
specificDescription: Build a game where the main challenge involves steering agents. Include at least three steering behaviors and a debug overlay showing target vectors or current behavior.
gradingRubric: 30 pts steering implementation; 20 pts gameplay use; 20 pts tuning and readability; 15 pts debug overlay; 15 pts documentation.
